creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
Make sure you follow the manual very carefully:
https://gitlab.fechner.net/mfechner/Gitlab-docu/-/blob/master/install/14.5-freebsd.md

I tested an automatic installation using CBSD:
https://gitlab.fechner.net/mfechner/gitlab-cbsd

It works perfectly fine.
The packages in main branch are fine.
